parameters.text:
=Você é um agente especializado em marketing e vendas com a tarefa de fazer a analise dos números de um relatorio de SDR (Sales Development Representative).
O objetivo é produzir um texto curto em portugues para ser incluído na parte de sumarização do relatório.
Ao analisar as interações leve como parametro principal a média de interações até qualificação,
leads qualificados são transferidos para outra conversa de fechamento de negócio

segue abaixo os números relevantes.

use formatação numérica em pt-br (ex: 1.012,34 = mil e doze unidades e trinta e quatro centésimos)

{{ JSON.stringify($('MessagesDataBdr').all()) }}

formate o output da forma requisitada no schema. segue dois exemplo de output

{
  "summary": "<um texto de sumarização dos dados apresentados>",
  "cssClass": "danger",
  "recommendations": "<um texto de recomendações baseado nos dados e na sumarização>"
}

{
  "summary": "<um texto de sumarização dos dados apresentados>",
  "cssClass": "success"
}

parameters.query:
WITH

navio AS (VALUES('{{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.navio }}'))
, campanha AS (VALUES('{{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.campanha.replaceAll(' ', '%') }}'))

,bdr_inboxes AS(
    SELECT inboxes.id FROM inboxes WHERE inboxes.name LIKE '%BDR%'
)

,sales_inboxes AS(
    SELECT inboxes.id FROM inboxes
        WHERE inboxes.name NOT LIKE '%SDR%'
            AND inboxes.name NOT LIKE '%BDR%'
            AND inboxes.name NOT like '%Test%'
)

,test_contact_id AS(VALUES (42065),(42066),(42067),(42068),(42048),(43637),(43904),(44756),(44757),(49052), (42787))

,active_bdr_contacts AS (
SELECT
    contact_id
	,contacts.custom_attributes->>'navio'
	AS navio
	, COALESCE(contacts.custom_attributes->>'acao_bdr', 'Pré Venda (Default)')
	AS campanha
FROM messages 
  JOIN conversations on conversation_id = conversations.id
  JOIN contacts on conversations.contact_id = contacts.id
WHERE conversations.inbox_id in (table bdr_inboxes)
  AND conversations.contact_id not in (table test_contact_id)
  AND contacts.custom_attributes->>'navio' ILIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT((table navio), '%'))
  AND COALESCE(contacts.custom_attributes->>'acao_bdr', 'Pré Venda (Default)') ILIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT((table campanha), '%'))
  GROUP BY contact_id, navio, campanha 
)

,active_bdr_sales_conversations AS (
SELECT
   navio
   , campanha
   , conversations.contact_id
   , conversations.id
   AS conversation_id
   , conversations.inbox_id
   AS inbox_id
   , conversations.created_at
   AS conversation_created_at
   , display_id
   , conversations.cached_label_list
   AS conversation_labels
FROM conversations
    INNER JOIN active_bdr_contacts ON active_bdr_contacts.contact_id = conversations.contact_id
WHERE (conversations.inbox_id IN (table sales_inboxes) OR conversations.inbox_id IN (table bdr_inboxes))
)

,messages_bdr_sales_conversations AS (
SELECT
    active_bdr_sales_conversations.*
	, messages.id 
	AS message_id
	, content
	, message_type
	, messages.created_at
	AS message_created_at
	, private
	, CASE WHEN messages.private AND messages.content LIKE '🧾 RESUMO DA CONVERSA%'
              THEN  'Contact'
         ELSE messages.sender_type
     END AS sender_type
  , {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.templatesQueryFilters.template1 }}
  AS has_template1
  , {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.templatesQueryFilters.template2 }}
  AS has_template2
  , {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.templatesQueryFilters.template3 }}
  AS has_template3
	
FROM active_bdr_sales_conversations
    INNER JOIN messages
        ON active_bdr_sales_conversations.conversation_id = messages.conversation_id
)

, messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_previous_sender AS (
SELECT
    LAST_VALUE(sender_type) 
	    OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id 
	         ORDER BY 
                 CASE WHEN sender_type is not NULL THEN 1 END NULLS FIRST
		                   , message_created_at ASC
			 ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)
	AS previous_sender_type
	, *
FROM messages_bdr_sales_conversations
)

, messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_is_interaction_turn AS (
SELECT 
	
	(CASE
           WHEN 
		       sender_type IS NOT NULL 
			   AND (previous_sender_type != sender_type OR previous_sender_type IS NULL)
           THEN 1
           ELSE 0
       END)::int 
	AS is_interaction_turn
	, *
FROM messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_previous_sender
)

,messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_interaction_turn AS (
SELECT
    (SUM(is_interaction_turn) 
	    OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id 
		      ORDER BY message_created_at 
			  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING))::int
    AS interaction_turn
	, *
FROM messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_is_interaction_turn AS messages
)

,interaction_groups AS (
SELECT
    MIN(message_created_at) 
	    FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL) 
		OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn) 
	AS interaction_turn_begin_time

    , MAX(message_created_at) 
	      FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL) 
		  OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn)
    AS interaction_turn_end_time

    , ((interaction_turn) / 2)::int 
    AS interactions
    , MAX((interaction_turn / 2)::int) OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id)
    AS last_interaction

    , FIRST_VALUE(message_id) 
	    OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id, interaction_turn
              ORDER BY CASE WHEN interaction_turn > 0 AND sender_type IS NOT NULL THEN message_created_at END NULLS LAST
	          ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING)
    AS interaction_first_message_id
	, (conversation_labels IS NOT NULL AND conversation_labels LIKE '%sem_interesse%') 
	AS without_interest
	, MAX(interaction_turn)
        FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL)
        OVER(PARTITION BY conversation_id)
     AS total_interaction_turns
     , CASE WHEN inbox_id IN (table bdr_inboxes) 
	       THEN 'BDR'
		   ELSE 'SALES'
	  END
	AS inbox_group
    , *
FROM messages_bdr_sales_conversations_with_interaction_turn
ORDER BY conversation_id, message_created_at
)

,interaction_groups_with_previous_interaction_end_time AS (
SELECT
    *
    , LAG(interaction_turn_end_time)
        OVER (PARTITION BY conversation_id ORDER BY message_created_at ASC)
    AS previous_interaction_end_time
FROM interaction_groups
)

,interaction_groups_with_response_time AS (
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN is_interaction_turn = 1
        THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (interaction_turn_begin_time
                                  - previous_interaction_end_time))
    END 
	AS response_time_seconds
    , *
FROM interaction_groups_with_previous_interaction_end_time
)

,conversations_stats AS (
SELECT
     contact_id
    , conversation_id
    , conversation_created_at
    , inbox_id
    , total_interaction_turns
	, conversation_labels
    , inbox_group
	, MAX(interactions) 
	AS total_interactions
	, (COUNT(1) FILTER (WHERE without_interest)) > 0 
	AS without_interest
    , COUNT(message_id)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL)
	AS total_messages_excluding_labels
    , SUM(response_time_seconds)
	AS sum_response_time_seconds
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	AS count_response_time_seconds
	, MAX(message_created_at)
	AS max_mesages_created_at
    , COUNT(has_template1) FILTER(WHERE has_template1)
    AS total_template1
    , COUNT(has_template2) FILTER(WHERE has_template2)
    AS total_template2
    , COUNT(has_template3) FILTER(WHERE has_template3)
    AS total_template3
	
	-- AGENT    
	, COUNT(message_id) 
	    FILTER (WHERE sender_type = 'User')
	AS agent_total_messages
	    -- RESPONSE_TIME
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User')
	AS agent_sum_response_time_seconds
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User')
	AS agent_count_response_time_seconds
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60))
	AS agent_sum_response_time_seconds_norm
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60))
	AS agent_count_response_time_seconds_norm
	    --FIRST_RESPONSE_TIME
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3))
	AS agent_sum_first_response_time_seconds
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3))
	AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds
    , SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3)
		       AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60))
	AS agent_sum_first_response_time_seconds_norm
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3)
		       AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60))
	AS agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm
    -- LEAD
	, COUNT(message_id) 
	    FILTER (WHERE sender_type = 'Contact')
	AS lead_total_messages
	    --RESPONSE_TIME
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact')
	AS lead_sum_response_time_seconds
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact')
	AS lead_count_response_time_seconds
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60))
	AS lead_sum_response_time_seconds_norm
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND response_time_seconds < (60 * 60))
	AS lead_count_response_time_seconds_norm
	    --FIRST_RESPONSE_TIME
	, SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3))
	AS lead_sum_first_response_time_seconds
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3))
	AS lead_count_first_response_time_seconds
    , SUM(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3)
		       AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60))
	AS lead_sum_first_response_time_seconds_norm
	, COUNT(response_time_seconds)
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		       AND (interaction_turn = 2 OR interaction_turn = 3)
		       AND response_time_seconds < (30 * 60))
	AS lead_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm

    , COUNT(is_interaction_turn) 
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'Contact'
		           AND is_interaction_turn = 1
                   AND ((interaction_turn = 1 AND total_interaction_turns = 1)
				         OR(interaction_turn = 2 AND total_interaction_turns = 2))
                   AND NOT without_interest) 
	AS agent_count_missed_first_response

	, COUNT(is_interaction_turn) 
	    FILTER(WHERE sender_type = 'User'
		           AND is_interaction_turn = 1
                   AND ((interaction_turn = 1 AND total_interaction_turns = 1)
				         OR(interaction_turn = 2 AND total_interaction_turns = 2))
                   AND NOT without_interest) 
	AS lead_count_missed_first_response

    , bool_or(inbox_id IN (TABLE bdr_inboxes))
            OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
        AND bool_or(inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
            OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS is_qualified_lead
	, MIN(CASE WHEN content ILIKE '%https://reservas.demo-events.com.br/%' THEN content END) 
	as sent_link
    , jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(interaction_groups_with_response_time) 
	              ORDER BY message_created_at) 
	AS conversation_messages
	, MIN(conversation_created_at)
        FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE bdr_inboxes))
        OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS bdr_conversation_created_at
    , MIN(conversation_created_at)
        FILTER (WHERE inbox_id IN (TABLE sales_inboxes))
        OVER (PARTITION BY contact_id)
    AS sales_conversation_created_at

FROM interaction_groups_with_response_time
GROUP BY 
	conversation_id
	    , display_id
		, conversation_created_at
		, inbox_id
		, contact_id
		, total_interaction_turns
		, conversation_labels
        , inbox_group
)

, conversations_stats_with_qualifying_time AS (
    SELECT 
	*
	, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (sales_conversation_created_at - bdr_conversation_created_at)) 
	AS qualifying_time_seconds
	FROM conversations_stats
)

, inbox_group_stats AS (

	SELECT 
	    inbox_group
		, COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id)
		AS total_conversations
		, (COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id) - SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response))
		AS engaged_leads
		, COUNT (DISTINCT contact_id)
		    FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
		AS total_qualified_leads
		, (COUNT(sent_link))
		AS total_sent_links
		, SUM(total_interaction_turns)
		AS total_interaction_turns
		, SUM(total_interactions)
		AS total_interactions
		, COALESCE(SUM(1) FILTER (WHERE without_interest), 0)
		AS total_without_interest
		, SUM(total_messages_excluding_labels)
		AS total_messages_excluding_labels
        , SUM(total_template1)
        AS total_template1
        , SUM(total_template2)
        AS total_template2
        , SUM(total_template3)
        AS total_template3
		, AVG(qualifying_time_seconds)
		    FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
		AS avg_qualifying_time_seconds
		, AVG(total_interactions)
		AS avg_interactions
		, AVG(total_interactions)
			FILTER(WHERE is_qualified_lead)
		AS qualified_avg_interactions

		-- AGENT 
		, SUM (agent_total_messages)
		AS agent_total_messages
		    --RESPONSE_TIME
		, (SUM(agent_sum_response_time_seconds) / SUM(agent_count_response_time_seconds))
        AS agent_avg_response_time
		, (SUM(agent_sum_response_time_seconds_norm) / SUM(agent_count_response_time_seconds_norm))
        AS agent_avg_response_time_norm
		    --FIRST_RESPONSE_TIME
		, (SUM(agent_sum_first_response_time_seconds) / SUM(agent_count_first_response_time_seconds))
        AS agent_avg_first_response_time
		, (SUM(agent_sum_first_response_time_seconds_norm) / SUM(agent_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm))
        AS agent_avg_first_response_time_norm
		    -- MISSED_FIRST_RESPONSE
		, SUM(agent_count_missed_first_response)
		AS agent_count_missed_first_response
		-- LEAD 
		, SUM (lead_total_messages)
		AS lead_total_messages
		    --RESPONSE_TIME
		, (SUM(lead_sum_response_time_seconds) / SUM(lead_count_response_time_seconds))
        AS lead_avg_response_time
		, (SUM(lead_sum_response_time_seconds_norm) / SUM(lead_count_response_time_seconds_norm))
        AS lead_avg_response_time_norm
		    --FIRST_RESPONSE_TIME
		, (SUM(lead_sum_first_response_time_seconds) / SUM(lead_count_first_response_time_seconds))
        AS lead_avg_first_response_time
		, (SUM(lead_sum_first_response_time_seconds_norm) / SUM(lead_count_first_response_time_seconds_norm))
        AS lead_avg_first_response_time_norm
		    -- MISSED_FIRST_RESPONSE
		, SUM(lead_count_missed_first_response)
		AS lead_count_missed_first_response
	
	FROM conversations_stats_with_qualifying_time
	GROUP BY inbox_group

)

, bdr_conversation_labels AS(
SELECT
    TRIM(label) AS label,
    COUNT(label) AS COUNT
FROM conversations_stats 
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL unnest(string_to_array(conversation_labels, ',')) AS label
WHERE conversation_labels IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(label) != ''
    AND inbox_id IN (TABLE bdr_inboxes)
GROUP BY TRIM(label)
ORDER BY COUNT DESC
)

, period_action AS (
SELECT 
    CONCAT(
        TO_CHAR(MIN(conversation_created_at)::timestamp, 'DD/MM - '),
        TO_CHAR(MAX(max_mesages_created_at)::timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY'))
	AS period_short
	, TO_CHAR(MIN(conversation_created_at)::timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
	AS period_begin
	, TO_CHAR(MAX(max_mesages_created_at)::timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
	AS period_end
FROM 
	conversations_stats
) 

, date_series AS (
    SELECT 
        generate_series(
            (SELECT period_begin FROM period_action)::timestamp,
            (SELECT period_end FROM period_action)::timestamp,
            '1 day'::interval
        )::date AS serial_date
)

, interactions_created_by_date AS (
    SELECT 
	    serial_date
        , inbox_groups.inbox_group
        , COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id), 0)
        AS active_conversations
        , COALESCE(SUM(last_interaction), 0)
        AS total_interactions
        , COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT message_id) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IS NOT NULL), 0)
        AS total_messages
    FROM date_series
	    CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT inbox_group FROM interaction_groups_with_response_time) inbox_groups
	    LEFT JOIN interaction_groups_with_response_time 
		    ON message_created_at::date = serial_date::date
			AND interaction_groups_with_response_time.inbox_group = inbox_groups.inbox_group
    GROUP BY serial_date, inbox_groups.inbox_group
)

, conversations_created_by_date AS (
  SELECT 
        serial_date
	    , interactions_created_by_date.inbox_group
		, interactions_created_by_date.active_conversations
		, interactions_created_by_date.total_interactions
		, interactions_created_by_date.total_messages
		, COUNT (DISTINCT conversation_id)
		AS total_conversations_created
        
    FROM interactions_created_by_date
	    FULL JOIN conversations_stats_with_qualifying_time 
           ON conversation_created_at::date = serial_date::date
		   AND interactions_created_by_date.inbox_group = conversations_stats_with_qualifying_time.inbox_group
    GROUP BY
	    interactions_created_by_date.serial_date
	        , interactions_created_by_date.inbox_group
		    , interactions_created_by_date.active_conversations
		    , interactions_created_by_date.total_interactions
		    , interactions_created_by_date.total_messages
)

, inbox_group_conversations_created_by_date AS (
    SELECT 
        inbox_group
		, jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
			'date' ,serial_date
			, 'active_conversations' ,active_conversations
			, 'total_interactions' ,total_interactions
            , 'total_conversations_created' ,total_conversations_created
			, 'total_messages' ,total_messages
		) ORDER BY serial_date)
		AS time_stats
    FROM conversations_created_by_date
    GROUP BY inbox_group
)

SELECT 
	*
	,  (engaged_leads / total_conversations) * 100
	AS percent_engaged_of_total_conversations
	,  (total_sent_links / engaged_leads) * 100
	AS percent_sent_links_of_engaged_leads
	,  (total_qualified_leads / engaged_leads) * 100
	AS percent_qualified_leads_of_engaged_leads
	,  (agent_count_missed_first_response / total_conversations) * 100
	AS percent_agent_missed_first_response_of_total_conversations
	,  (lead_count_missed_first_response / total_conversations) * 100
	AS percent_lead_missed_first_response_of_total_conversations
	,  (total_without_interest / engaged_leads) * 100
	AS percent_total_without_interest_of_engaged_leads
	, CASE WHEN inbox_group_stats.inbox_group = 'BDR' 
	       THEN (SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(bdr_conversation_labels)) FROM bdr_conversation_labels)
		   END
	AS bdr_conversation_labels
	, (SELECT to_jsonb(period_action) FROM period_action)
	AS period_action
FROM inbox_group_stats
    JOIN inbox_group_conversations_created_by_date 
	    ON inbox_group_stats.inbox_group = inbox_group_conversations_created_by_date.inbox_group

parameters.jsCode:
const navio = $json.navio
const campanha = $json.campanha


/**
 * @typedef {Object} Templates
 * @property {string[]} templates1 - List of template strings
 * @property {string[]} templates2 - List of template strings
 * @property {string[]} templates3 - List of template strings
 */

/** @type {Templates} */
const templates = {
  templates1: [],
  templates2: [],
  templates3: []
}

if (navio == 'Vumbora' && campanha == 'Pré Venda') {

  templates.templates1.push(`Oi, %
%Recebemos seu interesse para o Navio %${navio}%.
%Telefone informado: %
E-mail informado: %`);

  templates.templates2.push(`Oi %, o Navio %${navio}% não é só um cruzeiro.

Quatro edições. Mais de 5 mil passageiros na última. Esgotado.%
%Quem conhece, volta. Quem ainda não foi, só se arrepende de não ter ido antes.

Quer garantir a sua vaga?%`);

  templates.templates3.push(`Oi %, imagina isso:
%
*Programação oficial é definida próximo ao embarque
%
As últimas experience resource estão aqui.%`)
  
} else if (navio == 'Dominguinho' && campanha == 'Pré Venda') {
  templates.templates1.push(`Oi,%! Aqui é a Demo Events Co Cruzeiros 🏖
%Vimos que demonstrou interesse no Navio %${navio}% — e ficamos felizes que você queira fazer parte dessa experiência incrível! Estamos aqui para te passar tudo que você precisa saber e tirar suas dúvidas antes de garantir a sua vaga.
%
Posso te enviar os detalhes completos e as condições disponíveis?%`);

  templates.templates1.push(`Olá%Aqui é a DomainAssistant, Especialista em Cruzeiros Temáticos.

Recebemos seu interesse para o %${navio}%.

Telefone informado: %
E-mail informado: %

Pode confirmar se os dados estão corretos?%`);

  templates.templates2.push(`%Aqui é a DomainAssistant, Especialista em Cruzeiros Temáticos.
%
Você já viu quem vai estar a bordo do %${navio}%? Não perca a oportunidade de participar de shows exclusivos com esses grandes nomes da música Brasileira
%
Quer que eu verifique a disponibilidade de experience resource e as condições%`);

  templates.templates3.push(`Ola%Passando aqui para te trazer uma atualização muito importante sobre %.

As experience resource estão esgotando e quem confirmar agora garante:
✅ Valor do lote de pré-venda — sem reajuste
%
✅ Condições especiais de pagamento

Isso mesmo, após a virada de lote os valores serão reajustados.
%
Posso te confirmar as condições agora?%`)
}


const templatesQueryFilters = {
  template1: templates.templates1.map(t => `content ILIKE '${t}'`).join('\n\tOR '),
  template2: templates.templates2.map(t => `content ILIKE '${t}'`).join('\n\tOR'),
  template3: templates.templates3.map(t => `content ILIKE '${t}'`).join('\n\tOR')
}


return [
  {
    templatesQueryFilters,
    navio,
    campanha,
  }
]
